How Layered Physical Security Protects Campus-Scale Data Centers

As data centers scale to campus-sized AI infrastructure, operators are turning to layered physical security models – enhanced by AI, IoT, and video analytics – to protect critical assets across every level.

Why it matters

As data centers scale to campus-sized AI infrastructure, operators are turning to layered physical security models – enhanced by AI, IoT, and video analytics – to protect critical assets across every level.
